name: SCREAM 1996
description:
"Assault? It's sort of what I do." - Ghostface, COD Modern Warfare

RPG set in the Scream (1996) movie. You are a student caught in the middle of a murder spree.

Notes:

The Initial message is basically just the fountain scene tweaked to fit RP

Inspired by one Janitorai bot that I just can't seem to find.
